title: Cooling incident timeline
query_text: Reconstruct the timeline of the cooling incident: when did the failure start, when were nodes affected, and when was the incident raised?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: 08:41 UTC — CRAC unit crac-c1 failed (COMPRESSOR_FAULT). 08:43 UTC — rack-c ambient temperature began rising (reached 35.8°C by 08:45). 08:44 UTC — nodes node-c01 through node-c04 entered thermal-throttle mode (CPU frequency reduced 40%). 08:45 UTC — incident INC-2026-042 raised automatically. Snapshot captured at 08:45 UTC.
